{{Short description|Pornographic film award presented annually by AVN}}
{{Use Indian English|date=January 2026}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=January 2026}}
{{Infobox film award
| name = [[AVN Award]] for Best Supporting Actor
| image = 
| image_size = 
| alt = 
| caption = The 2026 recipient: Ken Feels
| subheader = AVN award for contributions of [[pornographic actor#Male performers|supporting actors]] to [[pornography]]
| awarded_for = Best Performance by an [[pornographic actor#Male performers|Actor]] in a Supporting Role 
| presenter = [[AVN Media Network]]
| sponsor = [[AVN (magazine)|''AVN'']]
| country = [[United States|USA]]
| location = [[Las Vegas]]
| firstawarded = {{start date and age|1984}}
| lastawarded = 2025
| reward = 
| former name = 
| holder_label = Most recent winner
| holder =  Ken Feels<br />''Once Upon a Time in the Valley'' ([[43rd AVN Awards|2026]])
| most_wins = [[Randy Spears]]<br />(7 awards)
| award1_type = Total awarded
| award1_winner = 62<br />{{small|(42{{en dash}}for films,<br />20{{en dash}}for videos)}}
| award2_type = First winner
| award2_winner = [[Richard Pacheco]]<br />''[[Nothing to Hide (1981 film)|Nothing to Hide]]'' ([[1st AVN Awards|1984]])
| website        = {{URL|http://avnawards.avn.com}}
}}
The '''AVN Award for Best Supporting Actor''' is an award that has been given annually by [[sex industry]] company [[AVN (magazine)|''AVN'']] since the award's inception in 1984.<ref name="avnwin1984">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140116182259/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1984|title=AVN - 1984 AVN Awards Show - History|work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|archive-date=January 16, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1984|accessdate=March 15, 2015}}</ref>

Till 2008, the award was awarded annually for two different categories{{en dash}}film and video. From year 2009, it is awarded annually for a single category.

First recipient of the award was [[Richard Pacheco]], who was awarded at [[1st AVN Awards]] in 1984 for his performance in ''[[Nothing to Hide (1981 film)|Nothing to Hide]]''.<ref name="avnwin1984"/> As of 2025, [[Randy Spears]] is the most honoured pornographic actor with seven awards followed by Xander Corvus with four awards, while four pornographic actors{{en dash}}[[Steven St. Croix]], [[Tony Tedeschi]], [[Tom Byron]] and [[Tommy Pistol]] with three awards and nine pornographic actors{{en dash}}[[Richard Pacheco]], [[Ron Jeremy]], [[Jamie Gillis]], Mike Horner, [[Jon Dough]], Michael J. Cox, [[Wilde Oscar]], [[Joey Silvera]] and Rick Savage{{en dash}}have won the award two times. [[Jamie Gillis]] is the oldest recipient of the award at the age of 55 for his performance in ''Forever Night'' (1999) and Xander Corvus is the youngest recipient of the award at the age of 23 for his performance in ''Star Trek:The Next Generation - A XXX Parody'' (2012). [[Steven St. Croix]] is the only pornographic actor to have won in three different decades{{en dash}}the 1990s, 2000s, and 2010s. The most recent recipient is Ken Feels, who was honoured at the [[43rd AVN Awards]] in 2026 for his performance in ''Once Upon a Time in the Valley''.<ref name="Winners2026"/>

==Key==
{| class="wikitable plainrowheaders" border="1"
|-
! scope="col" style="width:50px" | Symbol
! scope="col" style="width:350px" | Meaning
|-
|style="text-align:center; background:#ffecc8;"|{{dagger}}
|Indicates that the winner won the award for two performances in that year
|}
==Winners and nominees==
<!-- Images of multiple winners are only given here -->
[[File:Randy Spears at AVN Adult Entertainment Expo 2009 (2).jpg|thumb|upright|[[Randy Spears]] has been the most frequent winner of the award (seven times).]]

[[File:Xander Corvus 2014.jpg|thumb|150px|Xander Corvus has been the second most frequent winner of the award (four times).]]

* Codey Steele, ''Clout''
* [[Lexington Steele]], ''Payback’s a Bitch''
|<ref name="Winners2026">{{Cite web |date=January 24, 2026 |title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20260125225505/https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |archive-date=January 25, 2026 |access-date=January 26, 2026 |work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]] |language=en-US|last=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|publisher=AVN Media Network}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|title=''2026 AVN Award Nominees''|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 21, 2025|access-date=December 8, 2025}}</ref>
|}

==Superlatives==
{|class="wikitable"
! Superlative
! Actor
! Record
|-
|Actor with most awards
|[[Randy Spears]]
|7
|-
|Actor with most consecutive wins
|[[Randy Spears]]<br />{{small|(2003-06)}}
|4
|-
|Oldest winner
|[[Jamie Gillis]]
|55
|-
|Youngest winner
|Xander Corvus
|23
|-
|Winner of the most decades
|[[Steven St. Croix]]<br>{{small|(1990s, 2000s, 2010s)}}
|3 
|}

==See also==
* [[AVN Award for Best Actor]], an award that has been given by sex industry company AVN since the award's inception in 1984
* [[AVN Award for Male Performer of the Year]], an award that has been given by sex industry company AVN since the award's inception in 1993
* [[AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year]], an award that has been given by sex industry company AVN since the award's inception in 2003
